use_cases: Display customer testimonials with accompanying images or video content
Build social proof sections on landing pages and product showcases
Showcase user reviews with media attachments for enhanced credibility
Create testimonial grids on About or review pages
Feature user-generated content in marketing sections
ai_summary: A multi-media testimonial card component from ruixen.ui designed to display customer reviews with supporting image or video content. Built on Radix UI's AspectRatio primitive, this component combines social proof with rich media to enhance credibility and engagement on landing pages, product showcases, and review sections across SaaS and e-commerce platforms.
